purpose: Fold the FREE A*11:01 pMHC (no TCR) to measure the G12D Asp exposure in the free conformation vs the TCR-bound crystal 7OW6 (where it reads ~5%). Resolves whether KRAS-G12D is a real read-the-mutation binder target before spending PXDesign quota.
groove_source: PDB 7OW6 chain A (verified A*11:01; 7 polymorphisms vs A*03:01: 8F>Y,89A>D,104S>P,151E>A,155L>Q,160D>E,162T>R)
fold_jobs: Protenix Add Prediction, 2 chains (groove_A1101 + peptide), seed-matched: kras_g12d_A1101_MUT_pmhc (VVVGADGVGK) + kras_g12d_A1101_WT_pmhc (VVVGAGGVGK).
then: SASA the free MUT pMHC p6 Asp (scripts/66 logic). If exposed (>=25%) -> KRAS read-the-mutation viable, PXDesign hotspot B6. If still buried -> KRAS bounded like IDH1/BRAF.
